title: Workflow & connectivity
intro: Tooling that connects models to files, repositories, applications, and multi-step workflows.

items.name: Filesystem MCP Server
items.description: MCP server providing controlled access to the local file system.
features: Structured access to directories and files.
Explicit scoping and permission boundaries.
Support for reading unstructured and semi-structured data.

items.name: Git MCP Server
items.description: MCP server that exposes Git repositories as a queryable context for AI agents.
features: Access to repository files and version history.
Supports diff inspection and code navigation.
Enables agents to reason over evolving codebases as context.

items.name: Sequential Thinking
items.description: MCP server that provides structured step-by-step reasoning tools for AI agents.
features: Explicit reasoning and planning support.
Enables traceable and inspectable intermediate steps.
Improves reliability for complex tasks.

items.name: Slack MCP Server
items.description: MCP server that connects Slack workspaces to AI agents.
features: Retrieval of messages and channel history.
Enables agents to act on team communication.
Supports integration with collaboration systems.

items.name: Context7
items.description: MCP server that injects version-specific documentation and code examples directly into LLM prompts.
features: Fetches real-time documentation and code snippets.
Integrates with MCP-compatible tools to enrich prompts.
Provides version-aware context tailored to the current stack.
items.pricing: Free tier available; API key recommended for higher rate limits.

items.name: GitHub MCP Server
items.description: MCP server exposing GitHub repositories and pull requests as structured developer context.
features: Access to repositories and version history.
Querying issues and related metadata.
Linkage between code and discussions.
items.pricing: Free tier available for public repositories; subject to GitHub plan and API limits.

items.name: Docker MCP Server
items.description: MCP server providing access to containerized execution environments.
features: Execution within sandboxed containers.
Environment reproducibility and dependency isolation.
Control over side effects and resource usage.
items.pricing: Open-source and free to use; commercial pricing depends on Docker products.

items.name: Playwright MCP
items.description: MCP server that enables AI agents to control web browsers using Playwright.
features: Programmatic browser automation, including navigation and scraping.
Enables agents to retrieve live web content.
Supports headless and full browser execution.

items.name: Exa MCP Server
items.description: MCP server that provides access to web search and retrieval capabilities.
features: Semantic web search optimized for LLM use.
Retrieval of structured web documents.
Designed for grounding and knowledge access.
items.pricing: Free tier available; paid plans for higher usage.

items.name: Ref MCP
items.description: MCP server that provides structured access to reference materials and documentation.
features: Aggregation of reference documentation.
Structured retrieval for improved grounding.
Designed for developer workflows.
items.pricing: Free tier available; paid plans for advanced usage.

items.name: LiteLLM
items.description: Unified SDK and proxy server that provides a consistent interface to interact with many LLM providers.
features: Single API to access multiple LLM providers.
Built-in proxy server for routing and cost tracking.
Support for load balancing and retries across model calls.

items.name: Portkey
items.description: Control plane for AI applications that provides a unified API to connect with multiple LLMs.
features: Features including semantic caching, retries, and fallbacks.
Observability and tracking of tokens and cost across providers.
Support for guardrails and enterprise-grade security.
items.pricing: Free tier available for developers; usage-based pricing for professional and enterprise plans.

items.name: Martian
items.description: Dynamic router that automatically sends prompts to the best model based on cost and performance.
features: Model-agnostic routing to optimize for quality or cost.
Continuous evaluation of model performance across tasks.
Simplified integration with a single API endpoint.
items.pricing: Usage-based pricing based on routed requests.

items.name: MineContext
items.description: Framework for managing long-term and evolving context in LLM-based systems.
features: Persistent storage of contextual information beyond the prompt.
Relevance-based selection of context for reinjection.
Support for isolating different context types.

items.name: GSD Core
items.description: Meta-prompting and context engineering system designed for spec-driven development. Originally called 'Get Shit Done'
features: Spec-driven development with structured phases including planning and execution.
Multi-agent orchestration using sub-agents with isolated context windows.
Designed to manage context explicitly across tasks.

items.name: Pixeltable
items.description: Data infrastructure for AI applications that unifies tabular data and embeddings.
features: Combines structured data and vector embeddings in one storage layer.
Supports versioning and reproducible data pipelines.
Designed for building RAG and multimodal AI workflows.

items.name: Acontext
items.description: Context storage and retrieval framework focused on long-term memory for AI agents.
features: Explicit write and read APIs for persistent context.
Structured storage with metadata for selective recall.
Designed for multi-session and multi-agent scenarios.

items.name: QwenLong-CPRS
items.description: Context compression pipeline designed to reduce long inputs while preserving semantic fidelity.
features: Learned compression strategies for long documents.
Focus on preserving task-relevant semantics.
Designed to integrate into RAG pipelines.

items.name: LLMLingua
items.description: Framework for compressing prompts and long inputs to LLMs.
features: Token-level compression of prompts to eliminate non-essential information.
Variants that optimize compression for very long contexts.
Designed to improve efficiency and performance for models.
